sourceAmbiguity: Authenticated request creation could change question meaning or ordering.
decisionTaken: The bridge hands off to the existing Phase 1 mission frame instead of rendering request questions locally.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Question order, helper content, upload, review, and submit remain owned by Phase 1 intake.
operationalRisk: A future route shortcut could bypass the canonical shell.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Require any new signed-in entry to target the same intake route family.
